text: Welcome to Meta-Mind! I am your AI Architect. Let's take a quick tour.
Your main tools are tucked away here. Tap this button to expand the toolbar.

onEnter: const tb = document.getElementById('top-toolbar'); if(tb && tb.classList.contains('hidden')) { tb.classList.remove('hidden'); tb.classList.add('flex'); }
text: Here is your main toolbar. You can add new nodes or auto-arrange your map here.

onEnter: const tb = document.getElementById('top-toolbar'); if(tb && !tb.classList.contains('hidden')) { tb.classList.add('hidden'); tb.classList.remove('flex'); }
text: This rail controls your current view Phase. Here you can switch between Map, Data, or Web modes.
Need to edit a node's properties? Open the Inspector! Click the hamburger menu (or click Next to have me do it for you).

conditionText.text: The Inspector is already open! This is where you edit node properties. Let's move on.

text: Use this search bar to quickly locate nodes in massive constellations.
And I am always right here if you need me! You can ask me to generate entire map sections.
